meta.title: Alfa Sky — Premium Air Operator in Argentina
meta.description: Private flights, charters, and premium air solutions for government, corporate, medical, and executive aviation.

empresas.title: Corporate Services
empresas.short: Air logistics and tailored executive transfers

ejecutivo.title: Executive Aviation
ejecutivo.short: Maximum efficiency, privacy, and premium experience

estado.title: Government Services
estado.description: Air solutions designed for government agencies and security forces, with 24/7 operational capacity and comprehensive coordination.
useCases: Air support during emergencies and disasters
Coordination with federal and provincial forces

howWeOperate.detail: We assess the mission, area of operation, and specific requirements.
We define aircraft, crew, and logistics with a detailed plan.
We operate under the highest safety and coordination standards.
We deliver comprehensive reports and post-operation feedback.

empresas.title: Corporate Services
empresas.description: Tailored air operations for the private sector, with comprehensive coordination and maximum logistical efficiency.
bullets: Coverage for events, tours, and corporate tourism
useCases: Executive team transfers for key meetings
Urgent transport of critical parts or supplies
Air coverage for productions and filming

howWeOperate.detail: We listen to your needs and operational objectives.
We design the ideal solution with transparent pricing.
We handle permits, crew, catering, and ground handling.
We operate the flight and keep you informed at every stage.

sanitarios.title: Medical & Critical Services
sanitarios.description: Medical transfers and evacuations with equipped aircraft and dedicated operational support.
useCases: Medical repatriation from inland or neighboring countries
Air support for field health operations

howWeOperate.detail: We receive the request and assess urgency and requirements.
We prepare the aircraft with the necessary medical equipment.
We fly with a medical team onboard when required.
We complete the transfer to the receiving medical team.

ejecutivo.title: Executive Aviation
ejecutivo.description: Premium experience for executives and leadership teams, with nationally and regionally planned operations from start to finish.
useCases: Board meetings across multiple cities in a single day
Transfers to destinations without direct commercial flights

howWeOperate.detail: You contact us and we define destination, schedule, and preferences.
We present options with aircraft, itinerary, and pricing.
We coordinate every detail: crew, catering, transfers.
You fly with maximum comfort and personalized attention.

pillars.title: Operational Experience
pillars.description: Decades of experience in complex air operations, with specialized teams and current certifications.

pillars.title: Versatile Fleet
pillars.description: Aircraft selected for every type of mission, maintained under the highest industry standards.

pillars.title: 24/7 Coordination
pillars.description: A dedicated team available around the clock, managing every detail so you can focus on what matters.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.description: You reach out and we assess your operational needs.

steps.title: Proposal
steps.description: We design a tailored solution with a detailed budget.

steps.title: Coordination
steps.description: We arrange logistics: crew, aircraft, permits, and support.

steps.title: Operation
steps.description: We execute the flight under the highest safety standards.

fleet.sectionDescription: Aircraft selected to cover every operational need with maximum safety and efficiency.

atr42.name: ATR 42
atr42.headline: Regional capacity, boundless reach
benefits: Up to 48 passengers in a spacious, comfortable cabin
Perfect for regional routes and short runways
Efficient and versatile operation in all weather conditions
Adaptable configuration: passengers, cargo, or MEDEVAC

kingair200.name: King Air 200
kingair200.headline: Executive versatility, proven performance
benefits: Pressurized cabin for comfortable high-altitude flights
Access to airports with short runways
Capacity for up to 9 passengers in executive configuration
Ideal for corporate transfers and special missions

learjet50.name: Learjet 50
learjet50.headline: Speed and efficiency on every flight
benefits: Superior cruise speed to optimize your time
Refined executive cabin for up to 7 passengers
Ideal range for domestic and near-international flights

citationv.name: Citation V
citationv.headline: The premium experience in the air
benefits: Stand-up cabin with generous space and luxury finishes
Quiet and stable — ideal for working onboard
Perfect for demanding CEOs and executive teams

contact.sectionDescription: Have an operational question or need a quote? Our team responds quickly.

footer.description: Alfa Sky — Your air operator in Argentina. Private flights, charters, and air solutions for tourism and multi-destination experiences.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Alfa Sky, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your information.

sections.title: Data we collect
sections.content: When you use our contact form, we collect your name, email address, and the content of your inquiry. We may also record standard browsing data (IP address, browser type, pages visited) for analytical purposes.

sections.title: Purpose
sections.content: We use your data exclusively to respond to your inquiries, send you requested information about our services, and improve the browsing experience on our site.

sections.title: Retention
sections.content: Your personal data is retained only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purpose for which it was collected, or as required by applicable law.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.content: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time. You may also object to the processing of your data or request its portability.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: To exercise any of these rights or make privacy-related inquiries, contact us at info@alfa-sky.com.
